_comment: Add the 'hooks' block below to your ~/.claude/settings.json (or run scripts/setup-hooks.ps1 / scripts/setup-hooks.sh to do it automatically).
_comment_wsl2: WSL2 users: replace 'localhost' with your Windows host IP — run: awk '/^nameserver/{print $2}' /etc/resolv.conf

Notification._comment: Fires for: permission_prompt, idle_prompt, auth_success, elicitation events

Stop._comment: Fires once when Claude finishes generating a response

PermissionRequest._comment: Fires when Claude Code would show a permission dialog; includes tool name and input
